introSection:
Loop the Loop was a steel shuttle roller coaster located at Siam Park City in Bangkok, Thailand. The ride is the oldest inverting roller coaster in Southeast Asia and was built for, or shortly after, the park opening. It remained standing but not operating from 2003 (or earlier) until 2021.

It had a single vertical loop.
fullText:
Loop the Loop was a steel shuttle roller coaster located at Siam Park City in Bangkok, Thailand. The ride is the oldest inverting roller coaster in Southeast Asia and was built for, or shortly after, the park opening. It remained standing but not operating from 2003 (or earlier) until 2021.

It had a single vertical loop.
